hooks.command:
[ -d '.brain' ] && printf '
[MindLink] After your response, immediately update .brain/SESSION.md with what was just discussed — do not wait until the end of the session. Sessions can end without warning.
If your context was just compacted or you feel uncertain about project state:
  → Re-read .brain/MEMORY.md  (project identity, decisions)
  → Re-read .brain/SESSION.md  (current task, what is next)
  → Re-read .brain/SHARED.md   (what other sessions have written)
  → Re-read .brain/LOG.md      (last 5 entries for recent session history)
' || true
